controls.name: Organizational Context
controls.description: Organizational mission, stakeholders, and dependencies are understood.
controls.risk_if_missing: Security governance may not align with business priorities.

controls.name: Asset Inventory
controls.description: Assets that enable business objectives are inventoried and managed.
controls.risk_if_missing: Unknown assets increase attack surface and unmanaged vulnerabilities.

controls.name: Risk Assessment
controls.description: Cybersecurity risks are identified, analyzed, and documented.
controls.risk_if_missing: Unidentified risks may lead to unplanned security incidents.

controls.name: Identity and Access Management
controls.description: Identities and credentials are managed for authorized users.
controls.risk_if_missing: Unauthorized access and insider threats may increase.

controls.name: Data Security
controls.risk_if_missing: Sensitive data exposure and regulatory non-compliance may occur.

controls.name: Platform Security
controls.description: Configurations and patches are managed across technology platforms.

controls.name: Continuous Monitoring
controls.description: Systems and networks are monitored to identify cybersecurity events.
controls.risk_if_missing: Cyber attacks and breaches may be detected late.

controls.name: Adverse Event Analysis
controls.description: Potentially adverse events are analyzed to understand activity.

controls.name: Incident Management
controls.description: Response processes are executed during cybersecurity incidents.
controls.risk_if_missing: Poor response may increase impact and recovery time.

controls.name: Incident Communication
controls.description: Incident information is communicated to required parties.
controls.risk_if_missing: Legal, regulatory, and reputational harm may increase.

controls.name: Recovery Planning
controls.description: Recovery plans are executed and maintained.
controls.risk_if_missing: Extended downtime and permanent data loss may occur.

controls.name: Recovery Improvements
controls.description: Lessons learned are incorporated into future improvements.
controls.risk_if_missing: Repeated incidents may occur due to lack of learning.
